name: Cy4gate S.p.A.
summary: Cy4gate S.P.A. develops cyber electronic warfare and intelligence solutions for government and corporate organizations. The company offers A-QUBE, an advanced intelligence analytics platform to collect, analyze, and transform heterogeneus data flows into strategic intelligence outcome; and Real Time Analytics, a cyber security monitoring and incident response solution for corporates and companies, as well as operates CY4GATE Academy that provides recruiting, educational, and training programs to address needs in cyber intelligence, cyber security engineering, cybersecurity incident response and recovery, and cybersecurity assessment. It also provides cyber electronic warfare and intelligence solutions for government bodies and armed forces, such as D-SINT, an advanced intelligence analytics platform to collect, analyze, and transform heterogeneous data flows into strategic intelligence outcome; TACTICAL RTA to support the cyber team focusing on real-time threats; Homeland Security Solutions to deliver surveillance and control capabilities; and DIGILAB to perform digital activities for platform and system analysis, vulnerability management, and attack pattern engineering. In addition, the company develops platforms for network intelligence to support law enforcement agencies and security agencies in conducting operations; and provides clients with support in the design and development of cyber electromagnetic attack systems and simulation models. Cy4gate S.P.A. is based in Rome, Italy.
